title: The Matrix
plot: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.
cast: Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss

title: Inception
plot: A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Marion Cotillard, Joseph Gordon-Levitt

title: Interstellar
plot: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain

title: Avatar
plot: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.
cast: Sam Worthington, Zoe Saldana, Stephen Lang

title: The Dark Knight
plot: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests.
cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart

title: The Avengers
plot: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to save the planet from an alien invasion.
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Mark Ruffalo

title: Pulp Fiction
plot: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.
cast: John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman

title: Forrest Gump
plot: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and the Watergate scandal unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.
cast: Tom Hanks, Sally Field, Gary Sinise

title: The Shawshank Redemption
plot: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton

title: Titanic
plot: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet, Billy Zane

title: The Notebook
plot: A poor yet passionate young man falls in love with a rich young woman, giving her a sense of freedom, but they are soon separated because of their social differences.
cast: Ryan Gosling, Rachel McAdams, James Garner

title: The Fault in Our Stars
plot: Two teenagers with terminal illnesses embark on a cross-country road trip to find meaning in their lives.
cast: Ansel Elgort, Shailene Woodley, Nat Wolff

title: Jurassic Park
plot: A pragmatic paleontologist touring an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids.
cast: Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum

title: The Terminator
plot: A cyborg assassin is sent back in time to kill the mother of the leader of the human resistance against the machines.
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Michael Biehn

title: Back to the Future
plot: A teenager is accidentally sent 30 years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his friend.
cast: Michael J. Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson

title: The Ring
plot: A journalist must investigate a mysterious videotape which seems to cause the death of anyone in a week of viewing it.
cast: Naomi Watts, Martin Henderson, David Dorfman

title: A Quiet Place
plot: In a world filled with sound-hunting monsters, the only way to survive is to stay quiet.
cast: Emily Blunt, John Krasinski, Millicent Simmonds

title: The Conjuring
plot: Paranormal investigators work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.
cast: Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson, Ron Livingston

title: Toy Story
plot: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened when a new spaceman figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's bedroom.
cast: Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles
